metadata.traffic_splits_source: Reused from previous period (Mar-May 2026). Viewer origin patterns are stable month-to-month.
metadata.methodology: Active listings = exact count of currently active listings on the website (as of latest BQ date). Multipliers shown when all 3 subscription tiers have at least 20 such listings.
notes: Page views and inquiries are summed across Apr, May, Jun 2026 then divided by 3 for monthly average
Active listings = exact count from the latest available date, not a trailing average
multiplier_reliable = false when any tier has <20 qualifying listings (small sample warning)
Year-on-year growth compares same 3-month window in 2025
UK includes a 'Greater London area' entry that overlaps with England region
Lead values and price buckets cover Dec 2025 – May 2026 (6 months), a longer window than the traffic stats above
metadata.display_note: Page views and inquiries are per-month averages from trailing 3 months. Active listings are the exact current count.
metadata.lead_values_note: Lead values = asking price of the listing each inquiry was sent on. Median and average per market, 6-month window. EUR for European markets, USD (€×1.14) elsewhere, per sales currency reference.

regions.name: Andalusia (incl. Costa del Sol, Marbella, Malaga)
